name: Modern Relationships for Women by Full-Wisdom
summary: A personal growth course covering relationships, self-awareness, and emotional maturity, aimed at helping women build healthier connections.
best_for: Women looking for practical guidance on relationships and emotional well-being

name: ITZJUSTME Mindset & Empowerment E-Books
summary: A collection of empowering digital e-books focused on mindset, confidence, affirmations, and self-worth for women, girls, and parents.
best_for: Readers seeking short, uplifting mindset and confidence-building material

name: Soul Ascent Frequencies
summary: A set of six guided meditations built around the five levels of the soul in Kabbalah, combining guided voice, breathing practice, and binaural frequencies for relaxation and focus.
best_for: Listeners interested in guided meditation and binaural audio for relaxation

name: Speak with Confidence: Tame the Fear of Public Speaking
summary: An online course using a mindfulness-based method to help professionals calm public-speaking nerves and present with more confidence.
best_for: Professionals who get anxious presenting or speaking in front of groups

name: AI Printable Profits
summary: A step-by-step training on creating and selling AI-generated printable products using ChatGPT and Canva, including prompts and templates.
best_for: Aspiring digital product sellers who want to use AI tools to build a printables business

name: Trevor Ambrose Academy - Public Speaking, Confidence & Sales Skills
summary: Practical video courses covering public speaking, sales, and communication skills for people looking to close more deals and speak with confidence.
best_for: Salespeople and professionals wanting to sharpen communication and closing skills

name: Divorce & Separation Recovery Toolkit
summary: A recovery toolkit with emotional healing exercises, planning tools, guided worksheets, and legal and financial checklists to help people navigate divorce or separation.
best_for: Anyone going through a divorce or separation who wants a structured way to rebuild

name: FoodStorageIQ - Smart Food Storage App
summary: An app that tracks a household's food storage and calculates the exact day the pantry will run out, aimed at preppers and survival-minded households.
best_for: Preppers and families who want a clear, data-driven view of their food storage reserves
keywords: how long will my food last

name: Recovering from the Damage Caused by the Avoidant
summary: A relationship recovery program aimed at people healing from a relationship with an avoidant partner, addressing the anxious-avoidant dynamic.
best_for: People processing and recovering from a relationship with an emotionally avoidant partner

name: Healthy Minded Calm Reset System
summary: A digital wellness system with guided exercises, worksheets, and calming strategies designed to help adults reduce daily stress and quiet overthinking.
best_for: Adults dealing with everyday stress and overthinking who want a structured reset routine
